promotion_boundary.reason: XGB alpha158_fund promoted to primary; HF PatchTST to readonly shadow. On 2026-06-23 data XGB beats PatchTST decisively (XGB real IC +0.054, passes overall placebo + WF floor; PatchTST real IC -0.02, FAILS placebo, all-negative scores, 0 live trades). XGB itself did NOT pass the WF promotion gate (regime-sanity BULL_CALM/CHOPPY + BULL_CALM monotonicity) and lags SPY; promoted by operator override behind the residual controls below.

global_calibration.refit_note: Re-fit 2026-06-22 against the deployed XGB scorer; scorer_model_content_fingerprint matches.

conviction_gate.role: quality guard — only buy calibrated E[R-SPY] >= 3% (renquant-pipeline #140)

regime_admission.residual_risk: XGB fails regime-sanity in BULL_CALM/CHOPPY; regime admission ENABLED so XGB trades only validated regimes (not BULL_CALM). This narrows the deployment surface deliberately rather than trading a near-zero-edge signal. mu_floor is the additional within-regime quality filter.

disclosed_risks: XGB FAILED the WF promotion gate: regime-sanity (BULL_CALM, CHOPPY) + BULL_CALM trade-monotonicity.
Lags SPY: 0/3 walk-forward cuts beat SPY APY.
Weak in the dominant regime BULL_CALM (real IC +0.0149, below the 0.02 floor, placebo > real).
Aggregate real IC +0.054 is BEAR-inflated (carried by a rare, unvalidatable BEAR regime).
follow_up_exit_criteria: Strengthen the BULL_CALM cross-sectional signal so regime admission can be re-enabled and the override withdrawn.
Re-gate XGB after the signal fix and promote only on an organic pass.
Repair PatchTST to positive real IC or retire it from shadow.
